steps.name: the SauceDemo credentials are loaded from "credentials.json"
I login to SauceDemo as "standardUser"
I should be on the SauceDemo inventory page
the SauceDemo credentials are loaded from "credentials.json"
I login to SauceDemo as "invalidUser"
I should see the SauceDemo login error message

elements.name: Locked out user cannot log in

steps.name: the SauceDemo credentials are loaded from "credentials.json"
I login to SauceDemo as "lockedUser"
I should see the SauceDemo login error message

elements.name: Standard user adds two products and places an order

steps.name: the SauceDemo credentials are loaded from "credentials.json"
I login to SauceDemo as "standardUser"
I should be on the SauceDemo inventory page
I add the configured products to the cart
I open the cart
the cart should contain 2 items
I proceed to checkout
I fill in the checkout details
I finish the order
the order confirmation should be displayed

elements.name: Standard user cannot complete checkout with an empty cart

steps.name: the SauceDemo credentials are loaded from "credentials.json"
I login to SauceDemo as "standardUser"
I should be on the SauceDemo inventory page
I open the cart
the cart should contain 0 items
I proceed to checkout
I fill in the checkout details
I should see no products in the order summary
the SauceDemo credentials are loaded from "credentials.json"
I login to SauceDemo as "standardUser"
I add the configured products to the cart
I open the cart
I proceed to checkout
I submit checkout without filling in any details
I should see a checkout form validation error
